headline: Odine Partners with Supermicro (SMCI) to Accelerate AI Infrastructure Development in Türkiye
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) is one of the high growth NASDAQ stocks to buy now. On June 24, Odine entered into a partnership with Supermicro to accelerate the development of AI infrastructure in Türkiye. By using Supermicro’s global expertise in NVIDIA-validated, GPU-based high-performance systems and AI factory solutions, Odine will spearhead the deployment and […]
